title: Dark & Long (Dark Train)
meaning_summary: Dark & Long (Dark Train) earns at a smaller scale than Born Slippy but remains important in Underworld's club-canon and long-tail electronic catalog.
revenue_drivers: Specialist electronic playlists sustain long-form listening.
Club-culture recognition keeps the track active among core audiences.
Catalog discovery around Underworld's better-known material creates spillover value.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate infers current annual earnings from specialist streaming depth and long-tail electronic-catalog behavior.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split between label-controlled masters and creator royalty participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears materially tied to songwriter-side participation
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No song-specific catalog sale adjustment is assumed here
ownership.notes: This is an inferred gross-to-net range based on current catalog behavior, not a public royalty statement.
